strategy_summary: The eggs of body lice are attached to the hairs of their host with a cement-like substance. How Lice Turn Your Hair Into Their Jungle Gym  “Eggs of body lice, commonly called ‘nits’, are attached to the body hairs of the host by a cement-like substance.” (Wootton 1984:87)
mechanism:
The eggs of body lice are attached to the hairs of their host with a cement-like substance.

How Lice Turn Your Hair Into Their Jungle Gym

“Eggs of body lice, commonly called ‘nits’, are attached to the body hairs of the host by a cement-like substance.” (Wootton 1984:87)
